ah_line_note: Football-Data files in this sample expose AHh and AHCh as the Asian Handicap opening and closing line fields. M1 treats AHh/AHCh as the minimum line contract instead of legacy BbAH/BbAHh naming.

summary.current_season_policy: 2025/26 is CURRENT_NOT_FOR_BACKTEST and excluded from COMPLETE_BACKTEST.
